title: Food and Health Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Food made of two pieces of bread with meat, cheese, or vegetables inside.
choices: sandwich
lamb
spice
rounds.answer: sandwich
rounds.explanation: sandwich: Food made of two pieces of bread with meat, cheese, or vegetables inside.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Hard to bite, so you need to chew it a lot.
choices: sandwich
lamb
chewy
rounds.answer: chewy
rounds.explanation: chewy: Hard to bite, so you need to chew it a lot.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Large farm animals such as cows and bulls, kept for milk and meat.
choices: lamb
cattle
sandwich
rounds.answer: cattle
rounds.explanation: cattle: Large farm animals such as cows and bulls, kept for milk and meat.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.clue: Very dangerous; able to cause death.
rounds.answer: deadly

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Hard work, or the people who do it.

games.title: Sentence Puzzle

rounds.answer: I ate a chicken sandwich for lunch.
We added some spice to make the soup tastier.
The dried meat was very chewy.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.target: Fresh mangoes are better than candy because ______.
Explain one important unit idea, give a reason with because, and respond to two follow-up questions.

games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: My stomach hurt after I ate too much candy.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The farmer led his cattle to the field.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: Too many chemicals on food can be dangerous.
